Bash(cd "C:/Users/marce/OneDrive/02. Pessoal/Estudo/Aprendizado_ia/producao-conteudo/workshop-transcriber" && .venv/Scripts/python << 'PYEOF'
import re

with open\(r'C:/Users/marce/.claude/projects/C--Users-marce-OneDrive-02--Pessoal-Estudo-Aprendizado-ia-producao-conteudo-workshop-transcriber/6a278eef-5e34-4c39-8a3e-f591d6f7aa94/tool-results/toolu_01A29cS8Lir1eLVU3Nz6wd1H.json', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    raw = f.read\(\)

# Split by element_id boundaries
parts = raw.split\('\\\\"element_id\\\\":\\\\"'\)
print\(f"Total element_id occurrences: {len\(parts\)-1}"\)

results = []
for i, part in enumerate\(parts[1:], 1\):
    # Get element ID
    eid_end = part.find\('\\\\"'\)
    eid = part[:eid_end]
    
    # Look at the previous chunk for page_index \(last occurrence\)
    prev = parts[i-1]
    pidx_matches = list\(re.finditer\(r'\\\\"page_index\\\\":\(\\d+\)', prev\)\)
    page = pidx_matches[-1].group\(1\) if pidx_matches else '?'
    
    # Get text values in the current entry \(next 800 chars\)
    chunk = part[:800]
    texts = re.findall\(r'\\\\"text\\\\":\\\\"\([^\\\\]+\)', chunk\)
    
    results.append\(\(page, eid, texts\)\)

# Print all with sete-related text
print\("\\n=== SETE BRANDING ELEMENTS ==="\)
for page, eid, texts in results:
    text_str = ' '.join\(texts\)
    if any\(t in text_str.lower\(\) for t in ['sete', '@sete', 'aceleradora']\):
        print\(f"Page {page} | {eid}"\)
        print\(f"  Text: {text_str[:120]}"\)
PYEOF)

import subprocess, sys
from pathlib import Path
import tempfile, shutil

post_id = 'DC690moROTl'
url = 'https://www.instagram.com/p/DC690moROTl/'
audio_dir = Path\(tempfile.gettempdir\(\)\) / 'workshop_audio'
audio_dir.mkdir\(parents=True, exist_ok=True\)
destino = str\(audio_dir / f'{post_id}.mp3'\)
yt_dlp = str\(Path\(sys.executable\).parent / 'yt-dlp'\)

cmd = [yt_dlp, '--extract-audio', '--audio-format', 'mp3', '--output', destino, '--force-overwrites', url]
r = subprocess.run\(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True\)
print\('returncode:', r.returncode\)
print\('arquivo:', destino\)
import os
print\('existe:', os.path.exists\(destino\)\)
" 2>&1)

import httpx, base64, sys, io
from openai import OpenAI
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
from shared.config import OPENAI_API_KEY

sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8'\)

client = OpenAI\(api_key=OPENAI_API_KEY\)

slides = [
    'https://instagram.fqnv1-1.fna.fbcdn.net/v/t51.75761-15/486749464_18473483665070289_5833088208596297772_n.jpg?stp=dst-jpg_e35_tt6&_nc_cat=108&ig_cache_key=MzU5NzY1MjAwMzE2NzU1MDYyMg%3D%3D.3-ccb7-5&ccb=7-5&_nc_sid=58cdad&efg=eyJ2ZW5jb2RlX3RhZyI6InhwaWRzLjEyOTB4MTYxMi5zZHIuQzIifQ%3D%3D&_nc_ohc=yKCWLQB2lckQ7kNvwFpPvht&_nc_oc=Adkis_D9mKaEwDw1nmYmU7NTZmdcOxGIRRiRWaypPBzUCOQJixCDLKlXanincrIotl676kOpQL7Ktm6y9X47l5I9&_nc_ad=z-m&_nc_cid=0&_nc_zt=23&_nc_ht=instagram.fqnv1-1.fna&_nc_gid=8MM18bKs_2Iht11YIEQScA&_nc_ss=8&oh=00_Afy5p9J9m3d0U12AS-Vvkl0gWVYNo4-zmq-jMRRD6-3D7g&oe=69B7AD89',
    'https://instagram.fqnv1-1.fna.fbcdn.net/v/t51.75761-15/487278771_18473483668070289_6800229979484404387_n.jpg?stp=dst-jpg_e35_tt6&_nc_cat=111&ig_cache_key=MzU5NzY1MjAwMzE2NzQxOTQ3Ng%3D%3D.3-ccb7-5&ccb=7-5&_nc_sid=58cdad&efg=eyJ2ZW5jb2RlX3RhZyI6InhwaWRzLjEyOTB4MTYxMi5zZHIuQzMifQ%3D%3D&_nc_ohc=E0ySNZym0o4Q7kNvwHN6beW&_nc_oc=AdlBCbXMyq1KJP13sxD7A7zJvNviPs3GEMwYBkCJ3VlUaqYnNnddxwlnpy1gw2IImuyrDGCAciUJLkZD_ngmmBAn&_nc_ad=z-m&_nc_cid=0&_nc_zt=23&_nc_ht=instagram.fqnv1-1.fna&_nc_gid=8MM18bKs_2Iht11YIEQScA&_nc_ss=8&oh=00_AfxJX9bS_ANr1p0JEPWeW0IWBU_doCq-8vBwNkR5OML7FQ&oe=69B7C356',
]

for i, url in enumerate\(slides, 1\):
    r = httpx.get\(url, headers={'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0'}, follow_redirects=True\)
    img_b64 = base64.b64encode\(r.content\).decode\(\)
    resp = client.chat.completions.create\(
        model='gpt-4o',
        messages=[{'role': 'user', 'content': [
            {'type': 'image_url', 'image_url': {'url': f'data:image/jpeg;base64,{img_b64}'}},
            {'type': 'text', 'text': 'Extraia todo o texto visivel nesta imagem, na ordem de leitura. Preserve a estrutura. Responda apenas com o texto extraido.'}
        ]}],
        max_tokens=1000
    \)
    print\(f'## Slide {i}'\)
    print\(resp.choices[0].message.content\)
    print\(\)
" 2>&1)

import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
from processar_carrosseis import extrair_slides_e_legenda
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright

with sync_playwright\(\) as p:
    browser = p.chromium.launch\(headless=True\)
    page = browser.new_page\(\)
    imagens, legenda = extrair_slides_e_legenda\(page, 'https://www.instagram.com/p/DH8uSo0xkjM/'\)
    browser.close\(\)

print\('Slides encontrados:', len\(imagens\)\)
print\('Legenda:', legenda[:100] if legenda else '\(vazia\)'\)
" 2>&1)

import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
from processar_carrosseis import extrair_slides_e_legenda, _imagem_id
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright

with sync_playwright\(\) as p:
    browser = p.chromium.launch\(headless=True\)
    page = browser.new_page\(\)
    imagens, legenda = extrair_slides_e_legenda\(page, 'https://www.instagram.com/p/DH8uSo0xkjM/'\)
    browser.close\(\)

print\('Slides:', len\(imagens\)\)
for i, url in enumerate\(imagens, 1\):
    print\(f'  {i}: {_imagem_id\(url\)}'\)
" 2>&1)
